text:
item. 
SHORT NAME: PRF_PRFL 
LONG NAME: CARR_PRFRNG_PIN_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
15 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
CMS identifies providers using the National Provider Identifier (NPI; eff. May 1, 2007), which replaces 
legacy numbers (UPINs, PINs, etc.) on the standard HIPPA claim transactions.
